mapper.select: SELECT IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, WRITER, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD WHERE MENU_ID = #{ menu_id } ORDER BY IDX DESC
SELECT IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD WHERE IDX = #{ idx }
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BOARD WHERE IDX = #{ idx }
mapper.insert: insert into board ( idx, menu_id, title, content, writer ) values ( (select nvl(max(idx), 0) + 1 from board ), #{menu_id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer} )
